title: Crisp Jamaican Chicken Skewers
description: A bitter and crisp monsoon Jamaican dish featuring sherry vinegar, this recipe is paleo-friendly and perfect for dinner. The combination of ingredients creates a unique flavor profile that is both refreshing and savory.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together sherry vinegar, coconut oil, scotch bonnet peppers, garlic, ginger, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh thyme and scotch bonnet peppers.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
